name: Lee Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Lee Bank and Trust Company is an FDIC-insured regional bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services across Virginia locations.
description_long:
Lee Bank and Trust Company operates as a traditional community bank serving customers in Virginia, with physical locations in Bristol, Abingdon, and Pennington Gap. The institution is FDIC-insured, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government up to applicable limits. Based on their website, the bank has established itself as a full-service financial institution serving both personal and business banking needs in their region.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking products including multiple checking account options (Kasasa Cash Checking, Kasasa Cash Back Checking, and No Frills Checking), personal savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), Christmas Club accounts, Money Market accounts, and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, Lee Bank provides personal loans, home mortgage loans, home equity loans, auto loans, and personal lines of credit. Business customers can access business checking accounts and business loans. Digital services include online banking, bill pay, mobile banking, mobile wallet integration, eStatements, and a loan payment portal.

Lee Bank distinguishes itself through accessibility features (AudioEye-enabled website), local market focus with physical branch presence, and integration with Kasasa banking products that offer cash-back and rewards benefits. They provide tools to simplify switching from other banks through their Switch Kit and offer financial calculators for customer planning. The bank emphasizes convenience through mobile wallet capability, virtual branching, and online account opening.

As a regional community bank, Lee Bank serves customers seeking traditional banking relationships with local branch access. However, as a smaller institution, they may have more limited product offerings and technology sophistication compared to larger national banks. Customers should verify current rates, fees, and product availability, as community banks' offerings can vary significantly from major financial institutions.
services: Personal checking accounts (Free Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, No Frills)
Personal savings accounts and Statement Savings products
Personal loans and lines of credit
Debit cards with lost or stolen card services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Multiple checking account options including free Kasasa Cash accounts with rewards
Comprehensive loan products including mortgages, home equity, auto, and personal loans
Digital banking features including online banking, mobile app, and mobile wallet integration
Local branch presence in Bristol, Abingdon, and Pennington Gap, Virginia for in-person service
Switch Kit tool to simplify transferring direct deposits and automatic payments
Free financial calculators and accessibility options for disabled customers
Business checking and lending products for small business customers
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Virginia locations only
As a smaller regional bank, likely has fewer ATM locations compared to national chains
Website content does not clearly specify current interest rates or fee structures
No mention of credit card products, which many full-service banks offer
Limited information about business loan terms, amounts, or qualification requirements

contact.address: 41371 W Morgan Ave, Pennington Gap, VA 24277

best_for: Virginia residents seeking FDIC-insured savings and checking with local branch access
Small business owners in the Bristol, Abingdon, or Pennington Gap area needing business banking
Homebuyers in Virginia seeking local mortgage lending relationships
Customers prioritizing accessibility features and community bank service
diagnosis: Lee Bank is best suited for Virginia-based customers seeking traditional banking with FDIC insurance, local branch relationships, and a full range of personal and business products. The main caveat is that as a regional community bank, they lack the nationwide ATM networks and product breadth of larger institutions, and current rates/fees should be verified directly as they are not fully detailed on the website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 41371 W Morgan Ave, Pennington Gap, VA 24277
